ddls:
CREATE TABLE "greenspaces" (
  "greenspace_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each greenspace */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postal code associated with the greenspace */,
  "lsoa" TEXT /* Lower Super Output Area (LSOA) */,
  "greenspace_description" TEXT /* Description of the greenspace */,
  "nearest_greenspace_area_m2" REAL /* Area of the nearest greenspace in square meters */,
  "nearest_greenspace_distance_m" REAL /* Distance to the nearest greenspace in meters */,
  "greenspace_count_1000_m_radius" INTEGER /* Number of greenspaces within a 1000-meter radius */,
  "greenspace_area_sum_1000_m_radius" REAL /* Total area of greenspaces within a 1000-meter radius */,
  "lsoa_population_per_pcd" REAL /* Population per postal code district */,
  "distance_category" TEXT /* Category of distance to the nearest greenspace */,
  "lsoa_mean_nearest_greenspace_distance_m" REAL /* Mean distance to the nearest greenspace in the LSOA */,
  "lsoa_mean_nearest_greenspace_area_m2" REAL /* Mean area of the nearest greenspace in the LSOA */,
  "lsoa_mean_greenspace_count_1000_m_radius" INTEGER /* Mean number of greenspaces within a 1000-meter radius in the LSOA */,
  "lsoa_mean_greenspace_area_sum_1000_m_radius" REAL /* Mean total area of greenspaces within a 1000-meter radius in the LSOA */,
  "popbypark" REAL /* Population by park */,
  "pcd_start" TEXT /* Start of the postal code */,
  "pcd_end" TEXT /* End of the postal code */,
  "pcd_nospace" TEXT /* Postal code without spaces */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the greenspace */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the greenspace */,
  "greenspace_type_id" TEXT /* Greenspace type ID */,
  "area_m2" REAL /* Area of the greenspace in square meters */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the greenspace was established */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the greenspace was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the greenspace */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("greenspace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_greenspaces_lsoa FOREIGN KEY ("lsoa") REFERENCES lsoas ("lsoa"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_greenspaces_distance_category FOREIGN KEY ("distance_category") REFERENCES distance_categories ("distance_category"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_greenspaces_postcode FOREIGN KEY ("postcode") REFERENCES postcodes ("postcode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_greenspaces_greenspace_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("greenspace_type_id") REFERENCES greenspace_types ("greenspace_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "postcodes" (
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postal code */,
  "pcd_start" TEXT /* Start of the postal code */,
  "pcd_end" TEXT /* End of the postal code */,
  "pcd_nospace" TEXT /* Postal code without spaces */,
  "lsoa_population_per_pcd" REAL /* Population per postal code district */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the centroid of the postcode area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the centroid of the postcode area */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the postcode area */,
  "area_m2" REAL /* Area of the postcode area in square meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "lsoas" (
  "lsoa" TEXT /* Lower Super Output Area (LSOA) */,
  "lsoa_mean_nearest_greenspace_distance_m" REAL /* Mean distance to the nearest greenspace in the LSOA */,
  "lsoa_mean_nearest_greenspace_area_m2" REAL /* Mean area of the nearest greenspace in the LSOA */,
  "lsoa_mean_greenspace_count_1000_m_radius" INTEGER /* Mean number of greenspaces within a 1000-meter radius in the LSOA */,
  "lsoa_mean_greenspace_area_sum_1000_m_radius" REAL /* Mean total area of greenspaces within a 1000-meter radius in the LSOA */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the centroid of the LSOA */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the centroid of the LSOA */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the LSOA */,
  "area_m2" REAL /* Area of the LSOA in square meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lsoa")
)

CREATE TABLE "distance_categories" (
  "distance_category" TEXT /* Category of distance to the nearest greenspace */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the distance category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_category")
)

CREATE TABLE "greenspace_types" (
  "greenspace_type" TEXT /* Type of greenspace */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the greenspace type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("greenspace_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postal code associated with the population data */,
  "lsoa" TEXT /* Lower Super Output Area (LSOA) */,
  "popbypark" REAL /* Population by park */,
  "lsoa_population_per_pcd" REAL /* Population per postal code district */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the population */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the postcode area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_postcode FOREIGN KEY ("postcode") REFERENCES postcodes ("postcode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_lsoa FOREIGN KEY ("lsoa") REFERENCES lsoas ("lsoa")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "greenspace_id" TEXT /* ID of the greenspace being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the greenspace data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the greenspace data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_greenspace_id FOREIGN KEY ("greenspace_id") REFERENCES greenspaces ("greenspace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "greenspace_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "greenspace_id" TEXT /* ID of the greenspace associated with the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the project */,
  "project_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "impact_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the expected impact of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_greenspace_projects_greenspace_id FOREIGN KEY ("greenspace_id") REFERENCES greenspaces ("greenspace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_greenspace_projects_project_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project receiving the funding */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of the funding */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding */,
  "funding_date" TEXT /* Date when the funding was received */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_funding_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES greenspace_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the participant is involved in */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant in the project */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the participant */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the participant */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_participants_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES greenspace_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that caused the impact */,
  "impact_category" TEXT /* Category of the impact */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  "impact_date" TEXT /* Date when the impact was recorded */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* Specific metrics used to measure the impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_impact_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES greenspace_projects ("project_id")
)
